nasb.text: As the proverb of the ancients says, ‘Out of the wicked comes forth wickedness’; but my hand shall not be against you.

esv.text: As the proverb of the ancients says, ‘Out of the wicked comes wickedness.’ But my hand shall not be against you.

cnv.text: 正如古時的格言：‘惡事出於惡人。’所以，我的手不敢傷害你。

ccb.text: 俗语说，‘恶事出于恶人’，所以我不会动手伤害你。
